explanation: This is a direct replication of the first true positive command provided. It is included for baseline testing.
This is a direct replication of the second true positive command provided. It is included for baseline testing.
Substituted 'cmd.exe' with 'cmd' to test substitution of equivalent syntax.
Inserted extra space after '/c' to test insertion of whitespace.
Reordered '/ru system' and '/sc onstart' to test reordering of arguments.
Removed optional '/F' flag while preserving the core behavior of the command.
Used short form of command-line arguments where possible, such as omitting '.exe' from 'schtasks.exe'.
Used environment variable expansion to test path normalization (not applicable here as no paths were used).
Used double quotes around the task name to test insertion of quotes.
Escaped internal quotes in the command line to test safe use of escape characters.
